Package umm.digiquilt.view.blockAnimation

Interface Summary
BlockSortListener An interface for components who wish to be notified when an AnimatedBlockViewer finishes its animation.
 

Class Summary
BlockSorter A panel that displays a Block, and can be animated to show the tiles of the block moving into position to show how much of each color there is.
MovingTile A class to calculate where its tile should be placed, and how much it should be rotated, based on where the counter is.
QuiltSlideShow A block animation which transitions through a given list of Blocks.
SortByCoverage A class to sort fabrics based on coverage of a given Block.
UserSlideshow
